title: Chi nhanh trung tam
content: Chi nhanh trung tam o 120 Nguyen Trai, Quan 1, TP HCM. Tong dai ho tro: 1900 6868.

title: Gio lam viec phong kham
content: Phong kham lam viec tu 07:30 den 20:00 tu thu hai den thu bay, chu nhat tu 08:00 den 17:00.

title: Huong dan dat lich
content: De dat lich, ban dang nhap, vao muc Dat lich kham, chon bac si, chon khung gio va xac nhan thanh toan neu duoc yeu cau.

title: Huong dan doi lich
content: Ban mo chi tiet lich hen, bam Doi lich, chon khung gio moi con trong va xac nhan cap nhat.

title: Huong dan huy lich
content: Ban co the huy lich trong trang chi tiet lich hen. Neu da thanh toan truoc, he thong se hien huong dan hoan tien theo chinh sach.

title: Bang gia co ban
content: Kham tong quat tu 200000 VND, kham chuyen khoa tu 300000 VND, tai kham tu 150000 VND.

title: Ho tro bao hiem
content: Phong kham chap nhan BHYT va mot so bao hiem tu nhan. Ban can mang CCCD, the bao hiem, va giay to lien quan khi check-in.

title: Ho tro tai khoan
content: Neu quen mat khau, vao man hinh Dang nhap va chon Quen mat khau. Ma xac minh se duoc gui qua email hoac so dien thoai.

title: Goi y chuyen khoa
content: Trieu chung ho keo dai, kho tho: uu tien Ho hap. Dau nguc: uu tien Tim mach. Dau da day: uu tien Tieu hoa.

title: Co che RAG cua tro ly
content: Tro ly su dung co che retrieve tu kho tri thuc noi bo truoc khi tao cau tra loi. Neu khong tim thay ngu canh phu hop, tro ly se thong bao thieu du lieu thay vi doan.
